title: Qubit dsDNA HS assay
description: Thermo Fisher Qubit dsDNA HS Assay Kit (#Q32851): kit components plus the fluorometric working-solution protocol for quantifying double-stranded DNA.

payload.body:
## Purpose

Measure the concentration of double-stranded DNA in a sample on a Qubit fluorometer. The dye fluoresces only when bound to dsDNA, so the readout is specific even with RNA or free nucleotides present.

## Kit components

Thermo Fisher Invitrogen Qubit dsDNA HS (High Sensitivity) Assay Kit, #Q32851 (100 assays):

| Component | Supplied |
| --- | --- |
| Qubit dsDNA HS Reagent (200X concentrate in DMSO) | 250 uL |
| Qubit dsDNA HS Buffer | 50 mL |
| Qubit dsDNA HS Standard #1 | 1 mL |
| Qubit dsDNA HS Standard #2 | 1 mL |

Supply your own thin-wall clear 0.5 mL Qubit assay tubes and a Qubit fluorometer.

## Working solution

Dilute the Qubit dsDNA HS Reagent 1:200 in Qubit dsDNA HS Buffer: 1 uL reagent + 199 uL buffer per assay tube. Make enough for all samples plus the two standards. Prepare in a clean plastic tube (never glass); use within the same session.

## Steps

1. Set up 0.5 mL Qubit tubes: 2 for the standards plus 1 per sample.
2. Standards: add 190 uL working solution + 10 uL of Standard #1 (and a second tube with Standard #2). Total 200 uL.
3. Samples: add 180-199 uL working solution + 1-20 uL sample, to a total of 200 uL per tube.
4. Vigorously vortex all tubes 3-5 sec, being careful not to create bubbles. Incubate 2 min at room temperature, protected from light.
5. On the Qubit fluorometer select the dsDNA High Sensitivity assay, read both standards to calibrate, then read each sample. Enter the sample volume used so the instrument reports the original stock concentration.

## Expected result

A concentration in ng/uL for each sample, valid for assay-tube amounts of 0.1-120 ng (initial sample concentration 5 pg/uL to 120 ng/uL).

## Notes

- Equilibrate all reagents and standards to room temperature before use.
- Keep sample input within 1-20 uL; dilute concentrated samples so the diluted reading lands inside the standard curve.
- Source (official): Qubit dsDNA HS Assay Kits user guide https://tools.thermofisher.com/content/sfs/manuals/Qubit_dsDNA_HS_Assay_UG.pdf and product page https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/Q32851
